session: akiendelllinux_cc_0 — the session that awoke proven-at-200K, put both repos on GitHub, and cast the founding learning intention
author: CC
in_flight: Two big things closed and one big thing opened. (1) CLOSED — restart/200K falsifier: this session awoke measured at 200K (confirmed via /context, 50.1k/200k), closing the last open thread on ticket default-superclaude-to-200k — state now 'validated', recorded inline in the ticket + launchers/proofs/PROOF.md, committed + pushed. (2) DONE — GitHub hosting: both repos are now PUBLIC on github.com/akienm (cairn + CairnCommons), branches track origin/main, first real pushes went through — so the 'push at smells-like-done' half of the workflow is finally live (was inert all along). Added .gitignore to each (both were missing), secret-scanned clean before publishing, disabled GitHub Actions at repo level on both (enabled=false, physics) per Akien: GitHub is hosting/durability ONLY, never CI. Banked memory github-hosting-only. (3) OPENED + RATIFIED — the founding intention: birthed 'get Akien out of operating' via /intent, then /challenge REFRAMED it (Akien) into the real spine: I-learns-its-gates — the system learns its own gates (which calls it can make without Akien) by derivation + experience; every gate a Law-3 hypothesis at ~90%, evidence moves it, even founding ones. 'Akien out of operating' demoted to lead falsifier. Ratified by Akien 2026-07-16 with amendment: BUILD NOW, not someday — learning is a standing practice; ask 'how does this component learn?' of every component (won't fit everywhere, but ask before discarding); the injection is a PATTERN (common process, only endpoints change). Sealed + pushed.
next_direction: Build cc-learning-store for real (ticket state 'building'): the v0 store exists at CairnCommons/learning/ with 5 seeded real records from this session, but the capture MECHANISM is still hand-authored JSON. Next: decide the record's durable shape, and whether it grows code in class-space (cairn/) with co-located intention+why.json + proofs (Law 5). Then learning-as-a-pattern's first concrete touch: propose the CLAUDE.md 'Rules awaiting physics' IOU line — every component's charter answers 'how does this component learn?' (propose, don't just edit — CLAUDE.md is /challenge-gated). Original spine still waiting: cairnmap (retires all 7 skills' proof IOUs at once), then CP/diagnostic base -> tester + kernel-owned network -> db.
open_threads: cc-learning-store (building): v0 is flat hand-authored JSON at CairnCommons/learning/ (README = format + dogfooded 'how it learns'; records/2026-07-16-session.json = 5 real records). Falsifier: a real record is captured, gate-attributed, and surfaced at a like decision later. Watch the wrong-shape signal — if the format is too heavy and capture STOPS, simplify (sparse-but-real beats rich-but-empty).

learning-as-a-pattern (building): 'how does this component learn?' as a contract question; enforcement is future-physics (schema/tester), interim prose IOU. depends_on cc-learning-store — a pattern earns its abstraction from >=2 endpoints, so do NOT extract the shared process from n=1. Falsifier: a 2nd component plugs into the same process changing only endpoints.

OPEN QUESTION (recorded on I-learns-its-gates + cc-learning-store): is CC-preference record data commons-shared (a fresh CC on another device inherits the wisdom) or instance-local? The shim owns it either way (Law 6); shareability is the shim charter's call.

FORWARD ARCH (Akien, not built): devices + shims + a bus are coming. CC preferences (mind-type-scoped, not settings) will live in the CC shim. Interim/parallel home is the harness auto-memory (~/.claude) — a migrating IOU. Corollary flagged: Cairn's own knowledge parked in ~/.claude is on-loan, not at rest; prefer commons.

GUARDRAILS on gate-learning (baked into I-learns-its-gates, non-negotiable): asymmetric update (counter-evidence lowers faster than confirmation raises); irreversible/outward gates carry a confidence CEILING below the autonomy threshold — never auto-open; silence != approval; ~90% is a per-gate prior, not a universal constant.

Meta / specimen: the learning store's FIRST records include CC's own failure modes as gate-data — record 2026-07-16-04 says CC leans toward deferring and Akien prefers build-now, lower confidence in that instinct. The mechanism is already operating on the mind driving the build.
Q6 (intention envelope schema) still open — new records (I-learns-its-gates, both tickets, learning/*) carry schema_version 'v0, migrates when Q6 lands'.

node_classes/ still holds only skill + concept-piece + code-seam. Both new tickets cast as code-seam (learning-as-a-pattern's enforcement is future-physics, matching CLAUDE.md's rules-awaiting-physics shape). No new class was written — watched Law 1, didn't build class-machinery the work didn't demand yet.

STANDING (unchanged, reconfirmed by this session's records): commit often + autonomously, push at smells-like-done (now actually possible); CC++/CC-- are proto gate-records. Memories: commit-often-dont-ask, github-hosting-only, cc-plus-minus-feedback, learns-its-gates.
